title: New Bee Bluetooth Headset V5.1 Bluetooth Handsfree Earpiece Dual Mic with 500mAh Charging Case 72Hrs Play Time Hands Free Phone Earpiece Wireless Headset for Driving/Business with Android iOS, Blue
features: Large-capacity Battery and Long Standby: The New bee bluetooth headset is equipped with a 500mAh high-capacity charging case, which provides up to 72 hours of total music or talk time. The Type-C port enables a quick 1.5-hour full charge (0 - 100% in 90 minutes). The bluetooth handsfree earpiece charging case has LED display to show real-time battery percentages and reminds you more intuitively of the remaining power.

ENC Dual-Mic Noise Reduction: The bluetooth earpiece features ENC dual-mic with CVC8.0 noise reduction. The main mic is lengthened to accurately collect call sounds. The secondary mic collects ambient noise and enhances call quality through noise reduction processing of the main control chip. Besides, CVC8.0 can effectively further filter out background noise. Together, they can cut up to 90% of background noise, ensuring your voice is heard clearly.

Bluetooth 5.1 and Wide Compatibility: New bee handsfree bluetooth headset powered by the Qualcomm QCC3020 Bluetooth 5.1 chip to maintain 15m range connectivity with two devices quickly and stably. Support Dual pairing lets you instantly switch between Laptop and Smartphone without interruptions. The bluetooth phone earpiece with microphone is compatible with most bluetooth devices such as iOS or Android Phone/ Computer/ PC/ Laptops and so on.

Flexible and Ergonomic Design: With 270° rotating mic boom and 180° swiveling ear hook offer flexible adjustment, letting this single ear headset comfortably fit both left and right ears. This Bluetooth hands free earpiece boasts an ultra-light 13g ergonomic build and the in-ear design with three-point support and anti-slip grip stays secure during driving, working, etc. Our bluetooth handsfree earpiece comes 3 different sizes of ear tips are available to meet your different needs.

What You Get: 1*Bluetooth Earpiece; 1*500mAh Charging Case; 3*Ear Tips (Size: S/M/L ); 1*Type-C Cable (NO AC ADAPT); 1*User Manual. If there is any issue with your order, please don't worry, we will solve it for you promptly within 24 hours and get 3-year customer support services.
